ingredients.address: Akabane Sta., 13, Kita City, Tokyo 115-0045, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Akabane bus stop appears in the emotional finale of episode 13, where a key farewell and reunion moment takes place as members scatter after CRYCHIC's collapse.

ingredients.name: Akabane Station
ingredients.address: Akabane Station, 1-chōme-1 Akabane, Kita City, Tokyo 115-0045, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Akabane Station serves as a location in episode 13, part of the poignant travel and separation scenes that punctuate the series' bittersweet conclusion.

ingredients.address: Seijogakuen-mae Station, 6-chōme-5 Seijō, Setagaya City, Tokyo 157-0066, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This station appears in episode 13 as a transit point in the farewell sequence, capturing the feeling of members drifting apart after everything MyGO!!!!! had built together.

ingredients.address: Musashino Civic Cultural Hall, 3 Chome-9-11 Nakacho, Musashino, Tokyo 180-0006, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Musashino Civic Cultural Hall is featured in episode 9, serving as the venue for a pivotal live performance that tests whether MyGO!!!!! can hold together under pressure.

ingredients.name: Uzurayama Pharmacy
ingredients.entityContext: This local pharmacy near Ikebukuro appears in episode 8 as a background location in scenes showing the characters' daily life in the neighborhood around their usual haunts.

ingredients.entityContext: Omokage Bridge over the Shakujii River appears in episode 6 as Tomori walks alone at night, a quiet moment of isolation that captures her emotional state before the band's next crisis.

ingredients.name: Sunshine 60 Street

ingredients.entityContext: The main shopping street of east Ikebukuro appears in episode 4 as the band members cross paths in this busy area, cementing Ikebukuro's role as MyGO!!!!!s home ground.
